creator: support@mail.johncompanies.com
text:
How about:

JohnCompanies Collocation is a specialist in both dedicated and virtual 
FreeBSD servers. Unlimited technical support comes directly from FreeBSD 
engineers with NO complicated ticket system, NO impersonal auto responders 
and NO first level techs reading from cue-cards.  Servers are housed in a 
state of the art, secure hosting facility with multi-homed tier 1 backbone 
connections.



On Thu, 24 Aug 2006, Daniel Gerzo wrote:

> Hello,
>
>  We agreed that your submission has some gramatical issues (double
>  negatives for example) and therefore we are asking you if you would
>  like to rephrase your entry. It is your public relation, and the
>  text will be shown to users browsing our pages as you will submit
>  it. If you don't care, just let us know and we will use the original
>  submission.
>
> -- 
> Best regards,
> Daniel                          mailto:danger@FreeBSD.org
>
